name: Auntie Van's Christmas Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve 1 tablespoon Instant Coffee Granules in 1 tablespoon Hot Water.
Beat the granulated sugar and 1 cup of butter in a large bowl until light and fluffy.
Blend in the eggs and 1 teaspoon vanilla extract.
2. Gradually add flour and baking soda alternately with sour cream, mixing well after each addition.
3. Refrigerate the dough for at least 6 hours or overnight.
4. Divide the dough into four pieces. Roll out one piece on a lightly floured surface to an 1/8-inch thickness (keep remaining dough refrigerated).
5. Cut into desired shapes and place on ungreased cookie sheets.
6. Bake at 375°F for 10-12 minutes, or until bottoms are golden brown.
7. Repeat with the remaining dough.
8. Allow cookies to cool completely.
9. Frost with Coffee Frosting.
Coffee Frosting:
Dissolve coffee granules in water.
Beat 6 tablespoons butter in a medium bowl until soft.
Stir in the coffee mixture and 1 teaspoon vanilla extract.
Gradually add powdered sugar until well combined, achieving a good spreading consistency.
